seoDescription: Track platform updates, model catalog changes, and reliability improvements.

elements.text: The changelog documents product-facing improvements so teams can plan upgrades, update integrations, and communicate impact internally.

hero.heading: Platform Changelog
hero.body: Stay current on API updates, model availability, infrastructure improvements, and product roadmap milestones.

sections.title: Release Categories
sections.body: Updates are grouped by integration impact so teams can assess urgency quickly.

cards.title: API Changes
cards.description: Endpoint, payload, and compatibility updates for integrators.

cards.title: Model Catalog
cards.description: New models, deprecations, and performance profile updates.

cards.title: Platform Reliability
cards.description: Operational improvements for uptime, latency, and scaling.

sections.title: Adopting Updates Safely
sections.body: Use staging, monitoring, and rollout guardrails to absorb changes with minimal production risk.

cards.title: Staging Validation
cards.description: Verify payload and output expectations in non-production environments.

cards.title: Version Awareness
cards.description: Track evolving behavior and keep integration assumptions documented.

cards.title: Support Escalation
cards.description: Get help quickly when release impact needs deeper investigation.

contactPanel.heading: Need help evaluating a release?
contactPanel.body: Our team can help you assess impact and sequence rollout for minimal operational risk.
contactPanel.responseTime: Release support responses within one business day
